nasb.text: The mind of the hasty will discern the truth, And the tongue of the stammerers will hasten to speak clearly.

esv.text: The heart of the hasty will understand and know, and the tongue of the stammerers will hasten to speak distinctly.

cnv.text: 性急者的心必明白知識， 口吃者的舌頭必說話清楚。

ccb.text: 急躁的人必慎思明辨， 口吃的人必说话清楚流利。

csbs.text: 急躁人的心必领悟知识， 结巴人的舌必说话清楚流利。
